emergent_themes.description: Participants who make delivery decisions based on precise mathematical calculations rather than emotional or convenience factors
Single bad experiences leading to complete category abandonment despite promotions or improvements
Cooking as creative expression and desire fulfillment rather than necessity or routine

coding_summary: P019 represents a highly analytical, post-graduation user who approaches food delivery with mathematical precision. Key findings include: complete platform agnosticism driven by cost optimization, permanent grocery delivery rejection after one bad experience, intentional cooking philosophy that limits delivery appeal, and decreased ordering frequency due to fee structure changes. Her systematic expense tracking and subscription cost-benefit analysis reveal a user segment that responds to clear value propositions but has zero emotional attachment to brands.

coverage_gaps.reason: P019 shows minimal emotional engagement with food delivery - treats it as purely functional. Limited social influence beyond partner coordination.
